revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-4-190

A natural fine grained sediment consisting of granular and mainly siliceous products of rock weathering.


Note: In French a distinction is made between siliceous silt (silt) and organic silt (limon).

{{IALAFooter}}
